results.title: Evaluation of the Potential for Cytochrome P450 and Transporter-Mediated Drug-Drug Interactions for Cilofexor, a Selective Nonsteroidal Farnesoid X Receptor (FXR) Agonist.
results.abstract: Cilofexor is a selective farnesoid X receptor (FXR) agonist in development for the treatment of nonalcoholic steatohepatitis and primary sclerosing cholangitis. Our objective was to evaluate potential drug-drug interactions of cilofexor as a victim and as a perpetrator.
mesh_terms: ATP Binding Cassette Transporter, Subfamily G, Member 2
